title: First-play guidance localization and responsive repair
summary: Update first-play guidance, zh-CN/en copy and window/fullscreen responsive behavior around the real lamp/build interaction chain rather than static tutorial text.
acceptance: First-play guidance is rewritten around the real lamp/build interaction chain and does not describe unavailable controls
System-language default, zh-CN/en manual locale switching and visible command/job/status text remain consistent with no mixed-language player UI beyond the brand name
Windowed and fullscreen-equivalent layouts keep the map, active pawn feedback, action bar and inspector usable at 1280x720, 1366x768, 1600x900 and 1920x1080
Settings and diagnostics remain secondary surfaces and do not reintroduce first-screen information overload
Accessibility/readability checks cover state not relying on color alone, long text, button labels and hover/focus affordances

history.details: Implemented WM-0153 first-play guidance localization and responsive repair around the real WM-0152 lamp/build command chain; required checks pass.

verified: Verified WM-0153: inspected WM-0152 chain-aligned guidance/localization/responsive HUD diff, UI-only scope hygiene, player command feedback tests, and lightweight gates; full web-shell E2E/quality PASS accepted from report.

Integration gates passed in task worktree: typecheck, web-shell E2E 13/13, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality 74 files / 413 tests. WM-0135 generated report diff restored before integration.

forbiddenPaths: Simulation Worker or sim-core logic changes

review.summary: Verified WM-0153: inspected WM-0152 chain-aligned guidance/localization/responsive HUD diff, UI-only scope hygiene, player command feedback tests, and lightweight gates; full web-shell E2E/quality PASS accepted from report.

integration.summary: Integration gates passed in task worktree: typecheck, web-shell E2E 13/13, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality 74 files / 413 tests. WM-0135 generated report diff restored before integration.
